hooks.command: find bot -name '*.js' -print0 2>/dev/null | xargs -0 -r -n1 node --check && find collector -name '*.py' -print0 2>/dev/null | xargs -0 -r -n1 python -m py_compile
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'rm\s+-rf|git\s+push\s+--force|git\s+reset\s+--hard|DROP\s+TABLE'; then echo 'BLOCKED: 위험한 명령어가 감지되었습니다.' >&2; exit 1; fi
